Risk Level: HIGH_RISK
Use Case Category: employment_performance_monitoring
Applicable Articles: Article 8, Article 14, Article 5, Article 12, Article 9, Annex III, Article 10, Article 11, Article 13, Article 6, Article 6(2)(a), Article 15

🔴 This system is classified as high-risk and requires comprehensive compliance measures including conformity assessment.

intelligent_resolution.original_description: AI Resume Chat Interface - A high-risk AI system that analyzes and presents resume information using LLM providers (OpenRouter, OpenAI, Ollama). The system provides career information, resume analysis, and job matching capabilities. It processes personal data (resume information) and provides AI-generated responses about candidate qualifications and experience.
